# Hardship Discharge in Bankruptcy -- Requirements & How to Qualify [2026]
> Learn about hardship discharge | bankruptcyhardship.org in our free 2026 guide. Clear explanations, real data, and practical steps. T complete your chapter 13 plan? a hardship discharge may let you exit early. learn the requirements and how to qualify. updated 2026 guide.

## About
bankruptcyhardship.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Alternatives to Hardship Discharge: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/alternatives.html
- Best Interest of Creditors Test for Hardship Discharge: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/best-interest-test.html
- Hardship Discharge Case Law and Circuit Splits: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/case-law.html
- How to Request a Hardship Discharge: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/how-to-request.html
- Hardship Discharge in Bankruptcy -- Requirements & How to Qualify: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/
- Hardship Discharge for Medical Disability in Chapter 13: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/medical-disability.html
- Plan Modification vs Hardship Discharge -- Which Comes First?: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/modification-first.html
- What Qualifies for a Hardship Discharge?: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/qualifying-circumstances.html
- Hardship Discharge Requirements -- The 3 Elements of Section 1328(b): https://bankruptcyhardship.org/requirements.html
- Hardship Discharge vs Voluntary Dismissal -- Chapter 13: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/vs-dismissal.html
- Hardship Discharge in Bankruptcy -- 11 U.S.C. Section 1328(b) Guide: https://bankruptcyhardship.org/hardship-discharge.html

Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
